T&& P ; 20 Wtft, 2009 TPt ^ 3 flrfte ^ fft i [ m B w - n o i 1/1/2007Aref. ni] ^ i f w u i l , $&mCoffer) MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th Pebniary, 2009 S.O. 517(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-sectioa (2) of Section 1 of the Assam Rifles Act, 2006 (47 of 2006), the Central Government hereby appoints the 20th day of February, 2009, as the date on which the provisions of the said Act shall come into force.
